tests.name: graphView/provider/runtime seeds runtime defaults and exposes the inherited view registry getter
graphView/provider/runtime forwards bootstrap callbacks through the extracted method containers
graphView/provider/runtime keeps the method containers available through the internals helper
graphView/provider/runtime disposes the extension message emitter through the registered subscription
graphView/provider/runtime passes an empty workspace root to provider services when no folder is open
graphView/provider/runtime passes an empty workspace root to provider services when the folder list is empty
graphView/provider/runtime dispatches extension messages to listeners and stops after disposal
graphView/provider/runtime tracks the installed plugin activation promise
graphView/provider/runtime returns no persisted workspace refresh when there is no workspace root
graphView/provider/runtime returns no persisted workspace refresh when repo metadata has no pending files
graphView/provider/runtime loads persisted workspace refresh state from repo metadata
graphView/provider/runtime flushes queued workspace changes through the incremental refresh path
graphView/provider/runtime keeps queued workspace changes pending when only the timeline view is visible

runtime package build support vendors every Tree-sitter grammar needed by the core runtime

pipeline/analysis/analyze returns an empty graph when no workspace root is available
pipeline/analysis/analyze uses only default and plugin filters when user filters are omitted
